# Build manifest - expected contents of _site
# Update this file when intentionally adding/removing site content
#
# Syntax:
#   dir/        - directory (contents not checked by this test)
#   page.*      - page with format variants (.html, .md, .pdf, .epub)
#   file.ext    - exact file
#   path/       - forbidden directory path relative to _site
#   file.ext    - forbidden file path relative to _site
#
# Sitemap section uses full URLs

[directories]
assets/
blog/

[pages]
four-line-fridays.*
index.*
retainer.*
rpw_checkout_success.*
slack.*
status.*

[files]
feed.xml
holidays.ics
llms-full.txt
llms.txt
robots.txt
sitemap.xml

[forbidden_paths]
agent-worker.js
infra/
worker.js
workers/

[sitemap]
# Static pages in sitemap (blog posts are allowed dynamically)
https://www.speedshop.co/
https://www.speedshop.co/assets/files/TuneWikiEdu.pdf
https://www.speedshop.co/blog/
https://www.speedshop.co/retainer.html
https://www.speedshop.co/rpw_checkout_success.html
https://www.speedshop.co/slack.html
